content.speakerText: The PDF file is too big to send—can I share it via Google Drive instead?
content.speakerTextCn: PDF太大发不了，能改用Google Drive吗？

options.text: Sure! Just send me the link and set it to 'Anyone with link can view'.
I don't use Google Drive—send it via WeChat.
Why don't you just email it as a ZIP file?
I'm not sure—I'll ask my IT department.

content.explanation: 正确答案提供了清晰的操作指引（发送链接+设置权限），符合专业沟通标准。选项2使用非工作场景工具WeChat，不专业；选项3虽合理但未回应对方提出的Google Drive方案，属于转移话题；选项4推诿责任，不符合积极解决问题的职场沟通原则。

content.speakerText: I can't open the .xlsx file—it says it's corrupted. Any chance you can resend as .csv?
content.speakerTextCn: 打不开xlsx文件，提示损坏，能重发成csv吗？

options.text: I'll resend it as CSV right away—thanks for flagging this!
Maybe your computer is broken—try another one.
I already sent it yesterday, so it's not my problem.
CSV? I don't know how to convert it.

content.explanation: 正确答案体现了积极解决问题的态度，并感谢对方反馈，符合职场沟通规范。选项2指责对方设备问题，不专业；选项3推卸责任，破坏协作氛围；选项4表现无能，缺乏主动性。

content.speakerText: The presentation slides won't upload to the shared folder—it keeps timing out. Could I email them as a ZIP instead?
content.speakerTextCn: 演示文稿上传共享文件夹总是超时，能改用邮件发ZIP压缩包吗？

options.text: Yes, please email the ZIP file—make sure it's password-protected for security.
Just use Dropbox—it's faster than email.
I don't care how you send it, just get it to me.

content.explanation: 正确答案不仅接受替代方案，还主动提出安全建议（密码保护），体现专业性。选项2强行推荐其他工具，未尊重对方提议；选项3态度冷漠，缺乏协作；选项4回避问题，未提供解决方案。

content.template: I'd like to share the file via Google Drive—can you set it to '___ with link can view'?
content.hint: 这是设置文件访问权限的标准表达
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：Anyone with link can view

content.template: I'll resend it as ___ right away—thanks for flagging this!
content.hint: 这是对方请求的替代文件格式
content.knowledgePoint: 文件格式缩写：CSV（逗号分隔值）

content.template: The file is too large for email—would you mind if I send it via ___ instead?
content.hint: 职场中常用的云文件共享平台
content.knowledgePoint: 职场常用文件共享平台名称

content.speakerText: The PDF file is too big to send—can I share it via Google Drive instead?
content.speakerTextCn: PDF太大发不了，能改用Google Drive吗？
expectedAnswers: Sure, send the link and make sure it's set to 'Anyone with link can view'.
That works—just share the link and confirm the permissions are open.
I'd prefer a compressed version via email for security, but if you must use Drive, please set viewing permissions correctly.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确回应了替代方案的可行性
是否包含关键动作指令（如设置权限）
是否使用了场景核心词汇（Google Drive, link, view permissions）

content.speakerText: I can't open the .xlsx file—it says it's corrupted. Any chance you can resend as .csv?
content.speakerTextCn: 打不开xlsx文件，提示损坏，能重发成csv吗？
expectedAnswers: I'll resend it as CSV immediately—thanks for letting me know!
Got it. I'm converting it to CSV now and will attach it in 2 minutes.
Let me try opening it in Google Sheets first—sometimes it fixes corruption. If not, I'll send the CSV version right away.
evaluationCriteria: 是否先确认解决问题而非质疑对方
是否使用了积极回应的表达（如 immediately, right away, thanks）
是否准确使用了文件格式术语（CSV, .xlsx）

content.speakerText: The video file is 2GB—I can't upload it to the team drive. Could I send it via WeTransfer?
content.speakerTextCn: 视频文件有2GB，无法上传到团队网盘，能用WeTransfer发吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, WeTransfer is fine—just make sure the link doesn't expire too soon.
Go ahead! Please set the link to expire in 7 days and notify me when you send it.
I'd prefer a lower-resolution version via email, but if you must use WeTransfer, please share the password too.
evaluationCriteria: 是否清晰接受或建议替代方案
是否包含具体操作建议（如过期时间、密码）
是否使用了专业、礼貌的语气，避免命令式表达
